title: Add record: INT6 10L SWA NorMuon, val_bpb=1.2320
body:
- 10-layer GPT (MLP=1088) with INT6 quantization (3.82x compression), SWA (50 snapshots), NorMuon optimizer, Muon WD=0.02,
  aggressive warmdown
  - Pre-quant val_bpb=**1.1923** (competitive), post-quant val_bpb=**1.2320**
  - Post-quant degraded due to NTK RoPE eval at 4096 context — a rerun with standard 2048 eval expected to yield ~1.19
  - Model artifact: 14.2MB (1.8MB headroom under 16MB budget)
  - 9,956 steps in 600s on 8×H100 (60.27ms/step)

  ## Techniques

  | Technique | Details |
  |---|---|
  | INT6 quantization | Per-row amax scale, [-32,31] range, 3.82x compression |
  | SWA | 50 snapshots every 200 steps, averaged before quantization |
  | NorMuon | Per-row variance reduction after Newton-Schulz |
  | Muon WD | Decoupled weight decay 0.02 |
  | Warmdown=20000 | Cosine-like decay from step 0 for tighter weight distributions |
  | Architecture | 10L×512, MLP=1088, GQA 8/4 heads |

  ## Lessons Learned

  NTK RoPE eval at 4096 context hurt rather than helped (~0.04 BPB penalty). The pre-quant result (1.1923) demonstrates the model
  quality. Next iteration will eval at training context (2048) to close the quant gap.

  ## Test plan

  - [x] Training completed in <10min on 8×H100
  - [x] Artifact under 16MB (14.2MB)
  - [x] Post-quant round-trip validation passed
  - [ ] Rerun without NTK for improved post-quant score (pending compute)
